Acceptance Criteria: Product surface and output come from the current plugin UI, not a mockup or reconstruction.
AG1 uses Core-only profile; AG3 uses Pro profile; cross-plugin surfaces are not misrepresented.
Visible output belongs to the active note, block, Base, or selected reference.
No score, result, title, link, menu, formula, or control is invented or edited.
Static image claims only its visible state; motion is required for drag, hover activation, or transition.
Only the isolated fixture vault and neutral demo content are visible.
Target list, popover, Footer, link, or Base column is not clipped, stale, loading, or in error.
Scene, variant, run, environment, fixture snapshot, and raw file are recorded.
Viewer can state the intended belief in 3 seconds.
One evidence relationship dominates the frame.
Titles, evidence, and action remain readable at final output size.
Anchor and output are directly visible together.
The next useful action or payoff is obvious without a marketing overlay.
Same fixture topic and note family remain coherent across the set.
Caption names exactly what the visible state proves.
Image needs no rescue, cleanup, or truth caveat before publication.
Landscape 1200x628; square 1200x1200; portrait 960x1200.
Each file is at most 5,120 KB.
PNG in sRGB.
Useful raw crop is at least as large as the final export.
No generated product UI, fake buttons, slogans, or marketing callouts inside the product surface.
Every final file maps to exactly one approved raw capture and capture run.
